display.purpose: Hero headlines only; warm slab authority.

headline.purpose: Section H2s, usually with one Brand Green .highlight span.

label.purpose: Section kickers, spec annotations; the only sanctioned uppercase.

shadows.name: code-ambient
shadows.purpose: The one resting shadow, under inline code snippets.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Interactive cards on hover, paired with translateY(-2px). Never at rest.

shadows.name: featured-glow
shadows.purpose: Featured pricing card; at most one per page.

shadows.name: accent-pulse
shadows.purpose: CTA heartbeat keyframe endpoint (from 0 0 0 0 rgba(226,108,69,0.3)), 3s loop.

motion.name: transition-fast
motion.purpose: Hovers, color and filter state changes.

motion.name: transition-base
motion.purpose: Header border, sticky CTA slide, general transitions.

motion.name: hero-entrance
motion.purpose: The one choreographed moment per page.

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: Section entrances; content must be visible without JS.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.value: @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) disables all of the above

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one warm action per viewport. Ember Orange with ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: normal; padding: 0.7rem 1.4rem; border-radius: 10px; border: 1.5px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: filter 150ms ease, background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn:hover { filter: brightness(0.92); } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00c638; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary { background: #e26c45; color: #1c1c1a; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action where no primary shares the row. Brand Green border and text.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: normal; padding: 0.7rem 1.4rem; border-radius: 10px; border: 1.5px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00c638; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; border-color: #137b30; color: #137b30; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #edfcf1; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: The 'or just look first' option; pairs with primary in heroes.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem; line-height: normal; padding: 0.7rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 10px; border: 1.5px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #137b30; text-decoration: underline; text-underline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { filter: brightness(0.92); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00c638; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Default Badge
components.description: Status chip with the signature asymmetric radius and pulsing vivid dot.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.35rem; padding: 0.2rem 0.65rem; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: normal; border-radius: 20px 4px 16px; } .ds-badge-default { background: #edfcf1; color: #0d5822; border: 1px solid #c5f6d3; } .ds-badge-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #00c638; flex-shrink: 0; animation: ds-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.3; } }

components.name: Urgency Badge
components.description: Counts as the viewport's accent element; never alongside a CTA.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.35rem; padding: 0.2rem 0.65rem; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: normal; border-radius: 20px 4px 16px; } .ds-badge-urgency { background: #fdf0eb; color: #a3502e; border: 1px solid #f9d4c4; } .ds-badge-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #e26c45; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Hero Badge
components.description: Hero-scale badge (.badge-base in production), one per hero.
components.css: .ds-badge-hero { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.3rem 0.9rem; background: #edfcf1; color: #137b30; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: normal; border-radius: 20px 4px 16px; border: 1px solid #c5f6d3; } .ds-badge-hero::before { content: ''; width: 6px; height: 6px; background: #00c638; border-radius: 50%; animation: ds-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.3; } }

components.name: Section Label
components.description: The mono kicker above section headings; the only sanctioned uppercase.
components.css: .ds-label { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: normal; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: #0d5822; font-weight: 600; margin: 0; }

components.name: Info Card
components.description: Tinted compact card for facts (dates, capacity, score).
components.html:
Next squad: Q3 2026

6 Fridays · Online · 8.7/10 score
components.css: .ds-card-info { background: #edfcf1; border: 1px solid #c5f6d3; border-radius: 10px; padding: 16px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-card-info h4 { color: #0d5822; font-family: 'Zilla Slab', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.95rem; margin: 0 0 0.25rem; } .ds-card-info p { color: #137b30; font-size: 0.78rem; margin: 0; }

components.name: Code Snippet
components.description: The loop pseudocode chip; carries the one resting shadow in the system.
components.css: .ds-code-snippet { display: inline-block; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.8rem; line-height: normal; color: #0d5822; background: #ffffff; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #e5e2dc; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(28, 28, 26, 0.04); } .ds-code-snippet code { font: inherit; }

components.name: Pull Quote
components.description: Editorial quote: slab italic with a vivid dot before the cite. No border rules.
components.html:
“After writing my first LLM loop, I couldn't sleep.”

Kaido Koort
components.css: .ds-quote { margin: 0; max-width: 56ch; } .ds-quote p { font-family: 'Zilla Slab', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.35rem; color: #1c1c1a; font-style: italic; line-height: 1.45; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-quote cite { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #6b6b60; font-style: normal; font-weight: 600; } .ds-quote cite::before { content: ''; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: #00c638; }

narrative.overview: The tagline is the design doctrine. Curious play is the saturated half: vivid green dots, the crystalline butterfly with its deliberately asymmetric wing, asymmetric badge corners, the console easter egg. Epic growth is the grown-up half: a single locked hue (137) at one system saturation (73%), AAA body text, full borders instead of decoration, one warm action per viewport. The audience is developers who smell hype instantly, so the system proves rather than claims: real pseudocode in heroes, visible arithmetic, contrast ratios computed live on the public reference page.
keyCharacteristics: One green hue (137) in five locked steps; one orange accent, one per viewport
Slab-serif display warmth over geometric sans body
Flat surfaces, full borders, tint fills; shadows only as state response
Light mode only; dark sections are emphasis, never a theme
WCAG AA minimum, enforced in CI; AAA for body text
The crystalline butterfly mark is locked geometry, never recolored or re-faceted

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Exactly one accent-colored element per viewport: a CTA button OR an urgency badge OR an accent dot, never two. The mobile sticky CTA yields whenever another primary action is on screen. No accent hover variants.

rules.name: The 73% Rule
rules.body: Every green except vivid shares S=73%. Vivid's S=100% is the lone decorative exception. New colors do not enter the system.

rules.name: The Vivid Text Ban
rules.body: #00c638 is never text on a light background (2.5:1). Always name tokens explicitly; the --green alias is retired.

rules.name: The Two-Tier Green Rule
rules.body: Headings and links get Brand Green (AA); body text needing green gets Deep Green (AAA). Highlights: Brand Green on light, Vivid Green on dark.

rules.name: The Line-Height Trap Rule
rules.body: Body's 1.7 line-height leaks into compact components by inheritance. Every compact component must set line-height: normal.

rules.name: The Green Payload Rule
rules.body: Headings are near-black ink with at most one green phrase marking the payload: the word or phrase carrying the heading's claim (value, measure, LLM Loop, your codebase). No payload, no green: roughly a third of headings stay plain. Keep the phrase to 1-3 words; a definition heading may highlight the whole definition. Mechanics: .highlight is Brand Green on light, Vivid Green inside .on-dark, never Deep Green (disappears at heading sizes).

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: If a resting element needs separation, give it a border or a tint, not a shadow. Shadows are state (hover, floating) or the one featured exception per page.

dos: Do use Brand Green (#137b30) for text on light and Deep Green (#0d5822) when body text needs AAA.
Do keep exactly one accent element per viewport; let the sticky CTA yield.
Do use asymmetric grids (1.4fr/0.6fr) and rhythm: tight groupings, generous separations.
Do set line-height: normal on every compact component.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion alternative.
Do copy the butterfly SVG verbatim from /design-system Section 8; the geometry is locked.
Do prove instead of claim in copy: numbers, pseudocode, shipped work.
donts: Don't use Vivid Green (#00c638) as text on light backgrounds; it fails AA at 2.5:1.
Don't reintroduce the sci-fi mech era: no cyan, neon, glow effects, glassmorphism, or gradient text.
Don't use border-left or border-right thicker than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
Don't pair a 1px border with a wide soft shadow on a resting element (the ghost-card tell).
Don't add hero-metric stat-card templates, centered-everything desktop layouts, or all-caps headings (mono labels and trust bar excepted).
Don't use em-dashes in customer-facing copy.
Don't invent new colors, accent hover variants, or a dark theme; dark sections are emphasis, not a toggle.
Don't recolor, re-facet, mirror, or add effects to the butterfly mark.
Don't ship AI-slop aesthetics: if it could be any AI startup's template, it is wrong.
